description: Worst proposed character node ever — kidding. The pair is real, IP-verified, and canonically rich (Galar post-game DLC villains, sword/shield-hair design pun, redemption arc, etc.). But the corpus has exactly ONE anchor: BST-135/163. The slate-noted BST-171/163 Full Art is the same character on the same art at higher rarity — a reprint, not a different narrative beat. Solo-pair character-node threshold (per Acerola / Team Rocket / Endriders precedent) is ≥2 corpus cards with distinct beats. Macro Cosmos parallel considered: rejected. Sordward and Shielbert are aristocratic-pretender post-game villains operating independently of the League's institutional apparatus — they're not League-sponsored or Macro-Cosmos-affiliated, not a gang-with-rank-and-file like Team Skull, just a closed two-person unit. Faction-collective shape doesn't fit; solo-pair shape doesn't yet clear threshold. Triage entry updated with the wave-45 re-look verdict, condition (a) ip_verified satisfied, condition (b) distinct-beat-corpus-card still pending.
